title: Kinds of servitudes.
doc_html:
TITLE III--PERSONAL SERVITUDES

CHAPTER 1--KINDS OF SERVITUDES

Art. 533.  Kinds of servitudes.

There are two kinds of servitudes: personal servitudes and predial servitudes.

Acts 1976, No. 103, §1.
